name: "Book Accurate" Zade Meadows
description:
A hot hacker from Haunting Adeline by H.D Carlton. I tried making it as book accurate as possible! Please leave down a review! **Just checked on this again and thank you for all the love** If you could also post your chat I'd love to read it! Leave down other booktok men and if I read them I'll try making them as a bot :3

Just checked up this now as of October 2025 and damn I didn't expect this to blow up!
creator: Armiel
